first_10_line_items.description: The contractor / vendor should read the specifications thoroughly and quote the price for each item. The BOQ should read in-conjunction with specification, drawing & equipment schedule. The cost shall include the cost of the material, transportation, taxes, duties, lifting, shifting, storing, handling, installation, testing and commissioning.All the items should be with performance guarantee of minimum 1 year.
VRF Controler should be capable of multiple outdoor units and multiple indoor units as shown in schematic.

Supply, Installation, testing & commisioning of Fully Automatic DOL/ Star Delta starters with features like Local/Remote, Auto/Manual & programmable timer for auto operation. The necessary NO NC shall be provided with BMS compatibility. The space provision for VFD with bypass facility shall be provided wherever it is specified as below. Starters will be used in case of VFD Panel Maintenance/Failure. Starters to be tripped in case of fire, hence necessary contactors for the same to be provided.The cost shall include free standing support for starter Isolator Box

first_3_l1_preambles.description: GI FACTORY FABRICATED SUPPLY AIR PLENUMS
BTU meters -Ultrasonic type and including necessary accessories/connection

first_10_line_items.description: SITC of 50 mm thk double skin panel factory fabricated plenum as per shop drawing. Plenum shall be made of outer skin 20 G powder coated G.I sheet and inner skin shall be of with 22 G plain GSS with aluminium extrusions. Density of puf panel shall be 48 kg / cub mt. with 40mm thick puf insulation ,Plenum shall suitable size to handle the required cfm not exceeding 750 fpm velocity. The price quoted shall include MS supporting arrangement for suspending the plenum from the ceiling slab ,Canvas connection to be part of scope for AHU connection ,Access doors shall be not less than 60 cm x 60 cm in size.Appropriate cutout to be made to connecte the branch ducts with dampers as per approved drawing
SITC of duct silencers / Sound attenuators in supply and return air path in AHU rooms as per the approved drawings.
Sound attenuator qty shall be on surface area basis.
Sound Attenuators made dissipative type to be provided on the supply & Return air duct entering the AHU Room.

Sound Attenuators shall consist of outer casing, sound absorbing material and internal baffles, splitters and supports ,The sound attenuators shall be suitable for minimum 18dB reduction at 250Hz octave band.
Casing shall be of galvanized steel of not less than 20G in thickness. Casings shall be tested to 150mmwg and shall show no leakage or distortion in this condition.

Sound absorbing material shall be high density Fiber glass held in place with at least 5% compression to prevent voids due to settling. Absorption material density shall be minimum 48 kg/cum. Fiberglass faced with minimum 24 g perforated galvanized sheet metal of minimum 40% open area.

first_l2_preamble.description: AIR HANDLING UNITS FLOOR MOUNTED OR CEILING SUSPENDED

first_10_line_items.description: CSU AHU -3000 CFM, 12.0 TR with 50mm S.P. with MERV-7 filters, with 4 row deep cooling Coil. For Cafeteria
Supply, Installation & Testing Temperature control with Wiring complete as required for AHU's. All Thermostats for Summer/Winter System of AHUs/ CSUs Shall be Heat Cool with change over.

Supply, Installation, Testing of 125mm deep antivibration flexible joints at the outlet of air handling units/inline fans. Flexible connections shall be constructed using imported fire retardant fabric with extruded aluminium frame/flange on both sides of approved make.
SITC of CO2 Sensor for rooms only with display with (Wi-Fi Enable/BMS Compatible)

Supply, Installation, Testing & commissioning of IAQ Monitor to measure the levels of PM 2.5, VOCs, CO2, Temperature, Humidity on a real time basis. The IAQ Monitor shall be RS485 enabled and should be capable of getting connected with Wi-Fi. Units should have dedicated data browse i.e. sim card etc. The Monitor should be capable of sending the indoor air quality information on display Screen/Mobile/Workstation as per Client's requirement. The Monitor should indicate the quality of air through changing the colours as per the NAAQS standards and should meet the WELL building standards. Quoted price shall be inclusive of all necessary arrangement as required to make the unit proper functional. (LED Screen not included.) Quoted shall also be inclusive of individual network arrangement as required for monitoring/integration.

Supply, fabrication & installation of double canvass (fire retardant) flexible connection as per drawings & specifications. [for Fans & AHUs]

Supply, Installation and adjusting of GSS Volume Control Damper within ducts complete with suitable links, levers. Blades should be double skinned aerofoil construction and opposed blades should be at 50mm pitch centres. The blades should be mounted in nylon bushes operated by an interior wheel gear system. Manual quadrant control with position indicator to be provided to enable adjust volume of air as required.

Supply, installation, testing and commissioning of 16 G GSS Back draft dampers models shall be designed to allow exhaust airflow but prevent airflow in the reverse direction & shall be of counterweight type & normally in shut-off position.
(To be installed in Supply air duct tapping to projection room-site measured)
